creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

just to be able to further distinguish this from the issue seen on
HEAD, can you give me the following information from within the jail:

  sysctl security.jail.jailed
  ifconfig -a | egrep '(^[a-z]|inet6)'
  netstat -Wnf inet6
  netstat -Wrnf inet6

(do not worry if the commands fail)

In case you cannot/do not want to reply to gnats/public, pelase reply
to me directly.


Also, as you seem to have rebuilt the kernel yourself, can you give me
the output of (change the dir if needed):
  ident net/* netinet/* netinet6/*


/bz

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb                      The greatest risk is not taking one.
